title: Melted Gooey Slovakian Pepper Wrap
description: A peppery and gooey Slovakian dish featuring grilled peppers, perfect for meal prep, wrapped in a lotus leaf. This satvik-friendly recipe is easy to make and delicious to eat.
instructions: Preheat a grill to medium-high heat.
Grill the bell peppers until the skin is charred and blistered.
Peel the peppers and slice them into strips.
Heat the oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the grilled pepper strips, salt, and pepper to the pan and stir to combine.
Place a large lotus leaf on a flat surface and spoon some of the pepper mixture onto the center of the leaf.
Sprinkle some shredded cheese over the pepper mixture.
Fold the lotus leaf over the filling to form a wrap.
Serve the wraps hot and enjoy.
